title: A Bad Time
description: A mod for palladium that let's you turn into sans from undertale and gain his abilities!
body:
A mod for palladium that let's you turn into sans and use his abilities!

To become sans, you have to craft sans's soul (crafting recipe in gallery)

Abilities:
- Bone Throw
- Gaster Blaster
- Telekinesis
- Shortcut
- Bone Spikes
- Autododge


To remove powers, craft a reset button (crafting recipe in gallery)



Credits:
- Code: me!
- Gaster Blaster Model: BlazeHunter-56
